name: Prepared Pancake Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and sift the ingredients together three times.
2. Keep in a dry place.
3. To use: take 1 cup of the mixture and add 1/2 cup of dry bread crumbs.
4. Beat 1 egg in a separate cup.
5. Add sweet or sour milk to fill the cup.
6. Stir into the dry mixture, adding more milk if necessary to form a batter.
7. Bake on a hot griddle.
